output_payload.rationale: Providing crypto-asset services over other/utility tokens falls under Title V CASP licensing. Wave 20 chains cover CASP authorisation, transitional periods, MAR surveillance, and travel rule compliance.
output_payload.mica_note: MiCA Reg. (EU) 2023/1114: Title III = EMT issuers, Title IV = ART issuers, Title V = CASP service providers. Different licensing tracks.
